configHandlingMode.label: Config save mode
configHandlingMode.tipContent:
Embedded export: embed config in the Pipeline file, good for sharing a single file
Separate export: store config in a separate .mpe.json file for easier versioning
Do not export: save no config; import triggers auto layout
configHandlingMode.guardPromptDescription: On first export, confirm how Pipeline config should be exported

pipelineProtocolVersion.label: Pipeline export version
pipelineProtocolVersion.guardPromptDescription: On first export, confirm Pipeline export version

nodeAttrExportStyle.label: Node attribute export style
nodeAttrExportStyle.tipContent:
Object form: { name: 'C', anchor: true, jump_back: true }
Prefix form: '[Anchor][JumpBack]C'

exportDefaultRecoAction.label: Export default recognition/action
exportDefaultRecoAction.tipContent: When off: if recognition type is DirectHit with no params, recognition is omitted; if action type is DoNothing with no params, action is omitted. Checked independently.

exportEmptyParam.label: Placeholder when subfields are empty
exportEmptyParam.tipContent:
When off: if recognition/action param is an empty object, param key is omitted and only type remains.
When on: export a placeholder even when param is empty (v2 only).

jsonIndent.label: JSON indent
jsonIndent.tipContent:
Spaces per indent level when exporting JSON.
Default is 4 spaces; you can use 2 or another value.

skipFieldValidation.label: Skip field validation
skipFieldValidation.tipContent:
When on, field format validation is skipped on export even if node content is non-compliant.
Useful for quick export or debugging.

nodeStyle.label: Node style
nodeStyle.tipContent: Switch node display style: Modern has group headers and icons; Classic is the legacy layout; Minimal shows only icon and name

showNodeDetailFields.label: Show node secondary fields
showNodeDetailFields.tipContent: When off, nodes show only recognition and action types, hiding parameter details. Good when there are many nodes.

showNodeTemplateImages.label: Show template images
showNodeTemplateImages.tipContent: When on, modern-style nodes show template field thumbnails at the bottom. Requires local service connection.

showNodeFlowSection.label: Show next target nodes
showNodeFlowSection.tipContent: When on, the bottom of the node shows next and on_error target nodes.

defaultHandleDirection.label: Default handle position
defaultHandleDirection.tipContent:
Default handle position for new nodes
Left-right: input left, output right (default)
Right-left: input right, output left
Top-bottom: input top, output bottom
Bottom-top: input bottom, output top

__applyToAll.label: Apply handle position to all
__applyToAll.tipContent: Change all nodes' handle positions to the currently selected default

enableNodeSnap.label: Node snap alignment
enableNodeSnap.tipContent: When on, dragging nodes snaps to other nodes' edges and center lines with guide lines

snapOnlyInViewport.label: Snap only to visible nodes
snapOnlyInViewport.tipContent: When on, snap only to nodes within the viewport

edgePathMode.label: Edge path mode
edgePathMode.tipContent:
Curved: Bezier edges, smooth
Orthogonal: stepped right-angle edges, clear
Avoid: auto-avoid nodes on the path

showEdgeLabel.label: Show edge labels
showEdgeLabel.tipContent: When on, connection order is shown at edge center. Turn off if distracting. May add slight cost while dragging nodes.

showEdgeControlPoint.label: Edge drag handles
showEdgeControlPoint.tipContent: When on, drag the middle handle to adjust path shape (not saved). Double-click to reset one edge; layout tools can reset all.

uiLocale.label: Interface language
uiLocale.tipContent:
Follow system: auto-select from browser/OS locale
Or choose 简体中文, English, or ไทย manually

fieldPanelMode.label: Field/connection panel mode
fieldPanelMode.tipContent:
Fixed: panel pinned top-right
Draggable: panel can be dragged; position kept when selection changes
Inline: field panel beside node for direct canvas editing

inlinePanelScale.label: Inline panel scale
inlinePanelScale.tipContent: Overall scale of the field panel in inline mode, range 0.5–1.0. No effect in other modes.

quickCreateNodeOnConnectBlank.label: Create on connect to blank
quickCreateNodeOnConnectBlank.tipContent: When dragging from a node, if the end lands on blank canvas, open the add-node panel there. Off keeps the original behavior.

canvasBackgroundMode.label: Canvas background
canvasBackgroundMode.tipContent:
Pure white: white background for bright preference
Eye comfort: soft blue-gray (#f9fafd)

isAutoFocus.label: Auto focus
isAutoFocus.tipContent: When on, the viewport moves to focus new nodes automatically

focusOpacity.label: Unfocused node opacity
focusOpacity.tipContent: When a node or edge is selected, opacity of unrelated elements. Set to 1 to disable; below 1 highlights only related nodes/edges

enableLiveScreen.label: Live screen preview
enableLiveScreen.tipContent: After connecting a device, show live device screen top-right. Hidden when field/connection/JSON panels are open.

liveScreenRefreshRate.label: Screen refresh interval (ms)
liveScreenRefreshRate.tipContent: Device screen update interval in milliseconds. Lower is smoother but uses more resources. Recommended 500–2000 ms.

historyLimit.label: History limit
historyLimit.tipContent: Max undo/redo history entries. Too high may use more memory and cause stutter.

saveFilesBeforeDebug.label: Save files before debug
saveFilesBeforeDebug.tipContent: When on, current files are saved automatically before starting debug

__backendConfig.label: Local service settings
__backendConfig.tipContent: View and edit backend settings including server, files, logs, MaaFramework, etc.

wsPort.label: Connection port
wsPort.tipContent: Local service port. Reconnect after changing the port.

wsAutoConnect.label: Auto connect
wsAutoConnect.tipContent: When on, automatically try to connect to the local service on page load

fileAutoReload.label: Auto-reload changed files
fileAutoReload.tipContent: When on, externally modified files reload automatically

enableCrossFileSearch.label: Enable cross-file search
enableCrossFileSearch.tipContent: When on, search runs across all open files

crossFileSearchFolderFilter.label: Folder filter
crossFileSearchFolderFilter.tipContent: Filter local file list and cross-file search results. Paths relative to local service root; comma, semicolon, or newline separated. Empty means no filter.

screenshotResolutionMode.label: Screenshot resolution
screenshotResolutionMode.tipContent:
Device and web debug share this scaling:
Default: scale short side to 720 (maafw default)
Short side: scale short side to specified length
Long side: scale long side to specified length
Raw: no scaling, original resolution

MPE does not read interface.json; web debug uses this setting. ROI/OCR/template and debug runs share the same coordinate system.

screenshotResolutionValue.label: Resolution length
screenshotResolutionValue.tipContent: Target length in pixels for custom short/long side modes; other edge scales proportionally. Common values: 720, 1280, 1080, 1920

aiProviderType.label: API type
aiProviderType.tipContent: Choose AI provider type. Each uses different protocols and endpoint formats. For OpenAI-compatible third-party services (e.g. DeepSeek, Qwen), choose Custom

aiApiUrl.label: API URL
aiApiUrl.tipContent: API base URL or full endpoint. OpenAI: https://api.openai.com, Anthropic: https://api.anthropic.com, Gemini: https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com. OpenAI-compatible services: base URL or full /chat/completions URL

aiApiKey.label: API Key
aiApiKey.tipContent: Your API key, encrypted and stored locally in the browser (AES-GCM)

aiModel.label: Model
aiModel.tipContent: Model name to use, e.g. gpt-4o, gpt-4o-mini, claude-sonnet-4-20250514, gemini-2.5-flash

aiTemperature.label: Temperature
aiTemperature.tipContent: Controls AI output randomness. Lower (0.3) is more stable; higher (0.8) is more creative. Node prediction: 0.5–0.7 recommended

aiUseProxy.label: LocalBridge proxy
aiUseProxy.tipContent: When on, AI requests go through LocalBridge to avoid CORS limits. When off, browser calls API directly (must support CORS)

__testConnection.label: Test
__testConnection.tipContent: Test whether current AI settings work

__exportConfig.label: Export settings
__exportConfig.tipContent: Export current settings to JSON or import from JSON, including editor settings and custom node templates

__importConfig.label: Import settings
__importConfig.tipContent: Export current settings to JSON or import from JSON, including editor settings and custom node templates

__resetDefaults.label: Reset defaults
__resetDefaults.tipContent: Restore all settings to default values
